2332150.name: Frog Island
2332150.description:
Trapped on a deserted island, you are greeted by a mysterious woman who asks you to take care of her frogs while she is away. ​However, she vanishes the next day, leaving only a hand-written note behind:

"I'm terribly sorry, but some extremely urgent matters have sprung up that I must attend to. It will be a while until I return. Without a caretaker, these froggies will have no one to play with, and no one to take care of them. I've seen the kind of person you are. Kind, caring, and always willing to help. As such, I am entrusting the role of caretaker to you while I am gone. I hope you will accept this."

With nowhere to go, you have but two simple tasks:

1. Escape Frog Island
2. Accept the role of caretaker of Frog Island

Explore the island, grow crops, forage in the wild, fish, and befriend magical and divine frogs as you try to find a way to escape the island, and figure out why you're even here in the first place. Unravel the island's history, and discover the key to your escape, all while forming lifelong bonds with the island's magical and divine frogs. The true answers lie hidden within the island, waiting for you to uncover them.
2332150.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
